mapper.select: SELECT play_date AS playDate, session_no AS sessionNo, current_question_no AS currentQuestionNo, status, assigned_questions AS assignedQuestions, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM quiz_live_session WHERE play_date = #{playDate} AND session_no = #{sessionNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM quiz_live_session WHERE play_date = #{playDate} AND session_no = #{sessionNo}
DELETE FROM quiz_history WHERE play_date = #{playDate} AND session_no = #{sessionNo}
mapper.select: SELECT question_id FROM quiz_question ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT play_date AS playDate, session_no AS sessionNo, current_question_no AS currentQuestionNo, status, assigned_questions AS assignedQuestions, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM quiz_live_session WHERE play_date = #{playDate} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT u.name, RIGHT(u.phone, 4) AS phoneLast4 FROM quiz_history h INNER JOIN quiz_user u ON h.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE h.play_date = #{playDate} AND h.session_no = #{sessionNo} AND h.score = 10 ORDER BY h.reg_date ASC
